news.t: Homes are expensive right now, but these mortgage bonds look cheap

overview.description: The Janus Henderson Mortgage-Backed Securities ETF (JMBS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund of mortgage-backed securities. The fund seeks a high level of total return. JMBS was launched on Sep 12, 2018 and is issued by Janus Henderson.

data.title: Homes are expensive right now, but these mortgage bonds look cheap
data.text: U.S. homes may be wildly unaffordable for first-time buyers, but mortgage bonds backed by those same properties could be dirt cheap.
